serverUrl.label: AgentMemo Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL of your AgentMemo HTTP service (or use ${AGENTMEMO_URL})

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional bearer token for authenticated AgentMemo instances (or use ${AGENTMEMO_API_KEY})

userId.label: User / Namespace ID
userId.help: Optional user or namespace ID to scope memories

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations and store to AgentMemo

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories from AgentMemo into context before agent starts

serverUrl.description: Base URL of the AgentMemo HTTP service

userId.description: Optional user or namespace ID for scoping memories

autoRecall.description: Auto-inject relevant memories before agent starts
